notes: Wave 12 Track A candidate, from country-hub-data.js gap scan.
Date rule (floating, month 2, weekday Monday, nth 3) confirmed via WebSearch (English + Arabic queries) against Wikipedia/officeholidays.com/statutoryholidays.com.

Competitor check: arabz.ca lists it in a general holiday roundup, alforqannewspaper.ca only asks whether it's official without a full province breakdown, halacanada.ca is Toronto-specific practical content, Arabic Wikipedia is encyclopedic with no year-specific date — none give the precise province-by-province breakdown.

Differentiator: precise province coverage (AB/BC/ON/NB/SK observe as 'Family Day'; MB as Louis Riel Day; NS as Heritage Day; PEI as Islander Day; QC/territories/most of NL do not observe), which no Arabic source covers correctly.
